items.final_wording: Supports previous-anesthesia history, medical therapy, focused examination, airway and physical-condition assessment, and factors affecting perioperative risk.

source.title: Basic Standards for Preanesthesia Care
source.population: Patients receiving anesthesia care, with emergency modification permitted.
source.exclusions: Exact for record review, patient interview, focused examination, previous anesthesia and medical therapy, risk-relevant physical condition, tests, consultations, consent, and documentation. UAE policy and emergency modifications remain local responsibilities.
source.evidence_paraphrase: Supports previous-anesthesia history, medical therapy, focused examination, airway and physical-condition assessment, and factors affecting perioperative risk.

items.rationale: The ASA standard supports documenting previous anesthesia experiences and relevant medical therapy and physical condition without inferring that a prior event was an anesthesia complication.

items.final_wording: Supports review of records, interview about previous anesthesia experiences including prior awareness, focused risk assessment, and informing selected higher-risk patients without predicting awareness.

source.title: Practice Advisory for Intraoperative Awareness and Brain Function Monitoring
source.population: Patients receiving general anesthesia, with risk-factor and reported-awareness qualifiers.
source.setting: Preoperative risk assessment and post-event interview, documentation, and support after a report of intraoperative awareness.
source.exclusions: Exact for documenting previous awareness, focused record and interview review, selected risk discussion, post-event structured interview, occurrence reporting, and offered counseling or support. It is old, is not a guideline or standard, and does not establish that awareness occurred.
source.evidence_paraphrase: Supports review of records, interview about previous anesthesia experiences including prior awareness, focused risk assessment, and informing selected higher-risk patients without predicting awareness.

items.rationale: The awareness-specific section was reviewed but not mapped because the broad history workflow does not establish awareness as the prior event.
